pi_items.source: Task description string 'As the IT Asset Manager...'
Task description and generated company 'MedTech Corporation' fit Healthcare/Tech industry profile
Task instructions and verifier.py strictly require creating company 'Aura Health'
setup_task.sh dynamically injects department 'Consumer Wearables' and verifier.py checks its company assignment
setup_task.sh dynamically injects department 'Enterprise Health' as control group and verifier.py validates it remains unmodified
Task instructions target assets with 'Wearable' in their name, and setup_task.sh injects matching assets

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated data injected via SQL setup scripts. The target new company is 'Aura Health', which must receive the 'Consumer Wearables' department, its users, and assets containing the keyword 'Wearable'. The 'Enterprise Health' department serves as a strict control group that must not be modified.
